text.autoconfig.bossbarkiller.title: Boss Bar Killer Configuration
text.autoconfig.bossbarkiller.option.hid: When enabled, all boss bars will be completely hidden from view
text.autoconfig.bossbarkiller.option.sho: Show a message in the action bar when toggling boss bar visibility
text.autoconfig.bossbarkiller.keybind.in: Press 'H' key to toggle boss bars in-game. You can change this keybind in Options > Controls > Key Binds > Boss Bar Killer.
